raw_doc: This prospectus relates to the offer and sale of up to 15,000,000 shares of our common stock pursuant to our at-the-market offering program. Sales under this program will be made at prevailing market prices. Net proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, including the funding of clinical development activities for our lead product candidate XB-412 and working capital. We may sell shares from time to time as market conditions allow.

dilution_event: offer and sale of up to 15,000,000 shares of our common stock pursuant to our at-the-market offering program
capital_raise_language: offer and sale of up to 15,000,000 shares of our common stock pursuant to our at-the-market offering program
Sales under this program will be made at prevailing market prices
use_of_proceeds: funding of clinical development activities for our lead product candidate XB-412

rationale: Biotech ATM offering on S-3 with multiple use-of-proceeds items; dilution_event points to the core offering description.

raw_doc: We are offering 12,500,000 shares of our common stock and selling stockholders are offering 3,000,000 shares of our common stock. We will not receive any proceeds from the sale of shares by the selling stockholders. We intend to use the net proceeds from our sale of shares, which we estimate will be approximately $187 million after deducting underwriting discounts and offering expenses, to fund our commercial manufacturing scale-up, expand our direct sales force, and repay outstanding amounts under our revolving credit facility.

dilution_event: We are offering 12,500,000 shares of our common stock
capital_raise_language: We are offering 12,500,000 shares of our common stock
net proceeds from our sale of shares, which we estimate will be approximately $187 million after deducting underwriting discounts and offering expenses
use_of_proceeds: repay outstanding amounts under our revolving credit facility

rationale: S-1 IPO with a concurrent selling-stockholder secondary; tests that dilution_event captures only the primary offering shares.

raw_doc: The selling stockholders identified in this prospectus are offering 5,500,000 shares of common stock. We are not selling any shares in this offering and will not receive any proceeds from the sale of shares by the selling stockholders. The shares being offered were issued to the selling stockholders upon conversion of convertible notes in connection with our Series C preferred stock financing.

capital_raise_language: The selling stockholders identified in this prospectus are offering 5,500,000 shares of common stock

rationale: Pure secondary resale offering — company receives no proceeds and there is no primary dilution event; tests the empty dilution_event and use_of_proceeds paths.

raw_doc: This prospectus forms part of our shelf registration statement on Form S-3. We may offer from time to time common stock, preferred stock, debt securities, and warrants having an aggregate offering price not to exceed $500 million. Each time we offer and sell securities under this shelf, we will provide a prospectus supplement with specific terms and pricing. Proceeds from any offering will be used for working capital, capital expenditures, research and development, and potential acquisitions of complementary businesses or technologies.

dilution_event: We may offer from time to time common stock, preferred stock, debt securities, and warrants having an aggregate offering price not to exceed $500 million
capital_raise_language: We may offer from time to time common stock, preferred stock, debt securities, and warrants having an aggregate offering price not to exceed $500 million
use_of_proceeds: potential acquisitions of complementary businesses or technologies

rationale: Shelf registration with broad securities basket; tests multi-item use_of_proceeds for a generalist industrial company.

raw_doc: We are registering for resale up to 8,750,000 shares of common stock issuable upon exercise of pre-funded warrants and 8,750,000 shares of common stock issuable upon exercise of common warrants, all of which were issued in our private placement that closed on March 7, 2024 for aggregate gross proceeds of $70 million. We are also registering 1,200,000 shares of common stock issuable upon exercise of placement agent warrants. We will receive proceeds from the exercise of the pre-funded warrants and common warrants if and when such warrants are exercised for cash.

dilution_event: 8,750,000 shares of common stock issuable upon exercise of pre-funded warrants and 8,750,000 shares of common stock issuable upon exercise of common warrants
capital_raise_language: private placement that closed on March 7, 2024 for aggregate gross proceeds of $70 million
We will receive proceeds from the exercise of the pre-funded warrants and common warrants if and when such warrants are exercised for cash

rationale: PIPE resale registration with warrant coverage; dilution_event captures the warrant-share volume; use_of_proceeds is empty because this is a resale shelf.

raw_doc: This registration statement on Form S-1 relates to the initial public offering of 6,000,000 shares of our Class A common stock at an assumed initial public offering price of $18.00 per share, the midpoint of the price range set forth on the cover page of this prospectus. We estimate that the net proceeds to us from this offering will be approximately $97.2 million, after deducting estimated underwriting discounts and commissions and estimated offering expenses. We intend to use approximately $45 million of the net proceeds to retire our outstanding convertible bridge notes, approximately $30 million to fund the development and commercialization of our ThermalEdge platform, and the remainder for working capital and general corporate purposes.

dilution_event: initial public offering of 6,000,000 shares of our Class A common stock at an assumed initial public offering price of $18.00 per share
capital_raise_language: initial public offering of 6,000,000 shares of our Class A common stock at an assumed initial public offering price of $18.00 per share
net proceeds to us from this offering will be approximately $97.2 million, after deducting estimated underwriting discounts and commissions and estimated offering expenses
use_of_proceeds: approximately $45 million of the net proceeds to retire our outstanding convertible bridge notes
approximately $30 million to fund the development and commercialization of our ThermalEdge platform
working capital and general corporate purposes

rationale: IPO with three distinct use-of-proceeds buckets; tests S-1 form_type and exact quote matching for a concrete IPO price/size disclosure.

raw_doc: Pursuant to this prospectus supplement and the accompanying base prospectus, we are offering $150,000,000 of common stock under our equity distribution agreement with Morgan Stanley. Shares sold under this agreement will be sold at prices relating to prevailing market prices. We are also offering $75,000,000 of 6.50% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. Net proceeds from both offerings will be used to fund acquisitions of multi-family residential properties and for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment.

dilution_event: we are offering $150,000,000 of common stock under our equity distribution agreement with Morgan Stanley
capital_raise_language: we are offering $150,000,000 of common stock under our equity distribution agreement with Morgan Stanley
We are also offering $75,000,000 of 6.50% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
use_of_proceeds: fund acquisitions of multi-family residential properties
general corporate purposes, including debt repayment

rationale: REIT dual-security shelf offering (common + preferred ATM); tests that dilution_event focuses on the common equity dilution while capital_raise_language captures both instruments.
